title: Working Memory, Durable Memory, Write Admission, Provenance, and Poisoning Defense · Python Build Room
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds provenance-gated tenant-isolated memory service from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of provenance-gated tenant-isolated memory service while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit th…
objectives: Distinguish in-turn state, session memory, user preferences, task facts, organizational knowledge, examples, and audit records by owner and lifetime.
Admit memory only for an allowed purpose with source, claim type, confidence, sensitivity, consent or authority, expiry, and contradiction policy.
Retrieve candidate memories with provenance and policy, then validate relevance, freshness, authority, tenant, and conflicts before context use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Memory Kind Lifetime
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 1154 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to separate working and durable memory, gate writes, preserve provenance, isolate tenants, expire data, and reject poisoning; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Memory Poisoning Defense
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-memory-poisoning-defense-38olpd" that uses case 7337 to separate working and durable memory, gate writes, preserve provenance, isolate tenants, expire data, and reject poisoning. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Memory Poisoning Defense, keep Memory Poisoning Defense connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-memory-poisoning-defense-38olpd
# Competency: agentpy-memory-poisoning-defense.
# Case 7337: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def evidence_agentpy_memory_poisoning_defense_38olpd(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_38olpd = "38olpd-dplo83-7337"
    assert evidence_variant_38olpd
    evidence_axes_38olpd = (
        "authority38olpd",
        "interaction7337",
        "tooldplo83",
        "state38olpd7337",
        "evaluation733738olpd",
        "recoverydplo837337",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_38olpd)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"
